title: Roasted Ukrainian Pepper Delight
description: A hearty and flavorful dish inspired by Ukrainian cuisine, featuring roasted peppers as the main attraction.

ingredients.name: Peppers, any color
ingredients.notes: Any color or combination of peppers works well

ingredients.name: Roasted garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince roasted garlic for added depth

instructions: Cut peppers in half and remove seeds and membranes.
Brush peppers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Roast peppers in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until skin is blistered and charred.
Remove peppers from oven and let cool.
Scoop out flesh and chop into pieces.
In a large bowl, combine chopped peppers, roasted garlic, chicken broth, salt, and pepper.
Toss to combine and adjust seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
